messages.content:
# Pit Menu (on the right):
> Settings > Assetto Corsa > System > **"Pits menu" disable everything**
> Settings > Custom Shader Patch > General Patch Settings > Enable **"Stop AC from using D Pad in pits app"**
> Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > "System" > Enable **'Ignore Pov1 buttons in pits"**

# or
** **
> Open Steam > Right click Assetto Corsa > click properties > click local files > click browse
> Go to \system\cfg\pitstop.ini
> Open the .ini file with notepad and then change USE_MOUSE_PITSTOP=0 to be **=1**
> Relaunch Content Manager

# Time Remaining in Session (Top Middle)
> Steam\steamapps\common\assettocorsa\system\cfg\session_info.ini
> Change the following values:
> "PRATICE_VISIBLE=0"
> "QUALIFY_VISIBLE=0"
> "RACE_VISIBLE=0"

# No Hesi Speedometer & Points UI
> Click the `Gear` icon located at the top right of your screen.
> 
> - To turn off all of the Points UI, click the `toggle button` in the `Toggle UI` box
>     - To turn off specific Points UI parts, click `UI Settings` at the bottom, then click the `toggle button` for the specific part you want disabled.
> 
> - To turn off the speedometer, click the `toggle button` in the `Speedometer` box

# No Hesi Chat
> Click the `Gear` icon located at the top right of chat.
> Scroll down in the `Chat Settings` then click `Hide chat when inactive`
